title: SCBE-AETHERMOORE Licensing Term Sheet Template
content:
# SCBE-AETHERMOORE Licensing Term Sheet Template

CONFIDENTIAL - FOR DISCUSSION PURPOSES ONLY
Date: January 18, 2026
Licensor: Issac Daniel Davis
Licensee: [Company Name]
1. Licensed Technology
SCBE-AETHERMOORE quantum-resistant cryptographic framework
14-layer hyperbolic geometry security architecture
Post-quantum cryptography modules (Kyber768, Dilithium3)
Source code (Python + TypeScript implementations)
Patent rights (Patent Pending: [Provisional #])
Documentation and compliance test suites
2. License Grant
Type: Non-exclusive, worldwide license
Field of Use: [Specify: Financial Services / Healthcare / Defense / General]
Term: 3 years, auto-renewable
Deployment: Unlimited internal use, [X] external customer deployments
3. Financial Terms
Option A: Annual License
Year 1: $150,000
Year 2: $200,000
Year 3: $250,000
Renewal: $300,000/year
Option B: One-Time Purchase
Perpetual license: $750,000
Includes 2 years support
Excludes resale rights
Option C: Revenue Share
Upfront: $50,000
5% of gross revenue from products using SCBE
Minimum annual guarantee: $100,000
Audit rights quarterly
4. Support & Maintenance
Email/GitHub support: 48-hour response time
Quarterly security updates
Compliance report assistance (HIPAA, FIPS, PCI-DSS)
Integration consulting: 20 hours/year included
5. Intellectual Property
Licensor retains all ownership of patents, copyrights, trade secrets
Licensee may not reverse engineer or sublicense
Improvements/modifications owned by Licensor
Licensee receives updates for active license period
6. Compliance & Warranties
Code delivered "as-is" with documented test results
Licensor warrants non-infringement of third-party IP
Licensee responsible for own compliance implementations
Limitation of liability: License fees paid
7. Termination
Either party: 60 days written notice
Immediate termination for breach
Upon termination: Licensee ceases use, returns/destroys code
Accrued fees remain payable
8. Confidentiality
Both parties maintain confidentiality of proprietary information
Survives termination for 5 years
9. Governing Law
Washington State law
Disputes: Binding arbitration in Seattle, WA
Next Steps
Execute mutual NDA
Technical due diligence (1-2 weeks)
Negotiate final terms
Execute license agreement
Onboarding & integration kickoff
Questions? Contact Issac Daniel Davis: [email/phone]
